note_1_organization.scope: Franchisor of Hilton family brands in US, US territories, and Thailand for contracts executed/amended after October 24, 2007
note_1_organization.ip_license: Licenses IP from wholly owned Hilton affiliate on royalty-free basis

revenue_recognition.primary_obligation: IP license granting right to access brand IP, reservation systems, and PMS
revenue_recognition.recognition_method: Variable consideration (sales-based royalties) recognized as services provided over time
revenue_recognition.royalty_fees: Based on percentage of hotel monthly gross room revenue, billed monthly
revenue_recognition.franchise_sales_fees: Fixed, collected upfront, recognized over franchise contract term
revenue_recognition.contract_incentives: Amortized over contract life as reduction to franchise royalty fees

accounts_receivable.composition: Primarily amounts due from hotel owners under franchise contracts
accounts_receivable.allowance_method: Based on historical collection activity, nature of instrument, current/forecasted business conditions

franchise_contracts.capitalization: Contract acquisition costs + incremental costs to obtain contracts
franchise_contracts.amortization_method: Straight-line over contract term (generally 10-20 years including extension periods)
franchise_contracts.amortization_start: Opening date of hotel or contract execution date, whichever later
franchise_contracts.impairment_test: Undiscounted future cash flows vs. carrying value; if not recoverable, fair value writedown

franchise_deposits.treatment: Current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenues
franchise_deposits.refund_policy: If application not approved, refunded less processing fees

fair_value.hierarchy: 3-level (Level 1: quoted prices; Level 2: observable inputs; Level 3: unobservable)
fair_value.election: Fair value option not elected for any financial instruments

acquisitions_policy.assessment: Determine business combination vs. asset acquisition based on inputs/processes/outputs and concentration test
acquisitions_policy.asset_acquisitions: Allocated based on relative fair values; no goodwill recognized

note_3_acquisition.transaction: Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired May 2024
note_3_acquisition.context: Part of larger Hilton acquisition of Graduate brand
note_3_acquisition.amount: ~$85 million in franchise contract intangible assets

note_5_fair_value.assessment: Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated to equal carrying values as of Dec 31, 2024 and 2023

note_6_income_taxes.us_federal: No provision — entity is disregarded for US income tax purposes. All items included in Hilton's taxable income.
note_6_income_taxes.foreign: Certain US territories require taxation of franchise licensing payments. Rates vary by jurisdiction. Franchisee responsible for withholding.

note_7_commitments.debt_guarantee: Entity unconditionally and irrevocably guarantees certain Hilton debt obligations maturing 2025-2033. All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral.
note_7_commitments.litigation: Ordinary course claims and lawsuits. No expected material adverse effect.

note_8_related_party.centralized_cash_management: Hilton centralized system, not controlled by entity
note_8_related_party.franchise_deposits: Collected by Hilton affiliates, deposited in lockbox with no entity access
note_8_related_party.settlements_2024: $1.5 billion settled with simultaneous $1.5B distribution to parent
note_8_related_party.graduate_acquisition_funding: Affiliate paid for franchise contract intangibles; entity recognized short-term note payable settled in February 2024
note_8_related_party.operator_agreement: Agreement with Hilton affiliate for reasonable fee; no compensation provided 2022-2024

note_9_subsequent_events.note: Evaluation date appears to contain a typographical error — likely should be March 18, 2025 given the 2024 financial statements
